error.credentials_required: Access key ID and secret access key are required when not using an IAM role.
error.invalid_endpoint_url: Invalid endpoint URL. Please make sure it's a valid AWS S3 endpoint URL.

data_description.use_iam_role: Use the EC2 instance profile (IMDS) for credentials instead of static access keys. Requires the instance to have an IAM role with S3 access. See [documentation]({docs_url}).
data_description.access_key_id: Access key ID — leave empty when using IAM role
data_description.secret_access_key: Secret access key — leave empty when using IAM role
data_description.bucket: Bucket must already exist and be accessible with the provided credentials.
data_description.prefix: Folder or prefix to store backups in, for example `backups`

invalid_credentials.message: Bucket cannot be accessed. Check credentials or IAM role permissions.
